name: Peach Cobbler #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, grated nutmeg, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter with 1/2 cup sugar until well combined.
4. Beat in the flour mixture.
5. Oil a 9-inch square cake pan (a metal pan provides better texture for the finished dessert).
6. Place half of the peaches at the bottom of the pan.
7. Sprinkle half of the flour mixture over the fruit.
8. Add the remaining peaches and then the rest of the flour mixture on top.
9. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1/2 cup granulated sugar with the brown sugar.
10. Pour the almond extract mixed with boiling water over the cobbler, ensuring not to stir.
11. Sprinkle additional grated nutmeg on top and bake for 1 hour.
12. Serve warm.
